# Invoice Management API

**Layer:** Business | **Pattern:** Business Service
**BIAN:** AccountsReceivable (semantic_alignment)
**Generated by:** GitHub Copilot – Claude Sonnet 4.6

## Purpose

Implements the Accounts Payable invoice lifecycle: registration, validation, approval/rejection and cancellation. Orchestrates supplier validation (ERP) and state transitions (domain layer).

## Key Business Rules Enforced

| Rule | Description |
|------|-------------|
| BR-001 | Supplier must exist and be active in ERP |
| BR-002 | (supplier_id, invoice_number) must be unique |
| BR-003 | Initial state must be PENDING |
| BR-004 | Only PENDING invoices can be approved/rejected |
| BR-005 | Actor and timestamp recorded on every transition |

## Endpoints

| Method | Path | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| POST | /invoices | Register new invoice |
| GET | /invoices | List with filters |
| GET | /invoices/{id} | Get invoice detail |
| PUT | /invoices/{id} | Edit (PENDING only) |
| POST | /invoices/{id}/approve | Approve invoice |
| POST | /invoices/{id}/reject | Reject invoice |
| POST | /invoices/{id}/cancel | Cancel invoice |

## Dependencies

| API | Purpose |
|-----|---------|
| invoice-lifecycle-api | State transitions + audit trail |
| erp-integration-api | Supplier validation |

## Data Ownership

PostgreSQL: `invoices` table with unique constraint on `(supplier_id, invoice_number)`.
